info.title: Resolving post-upgrade issues in the &ha; cluster

abstract.para: Use the cluster health check tool to list issues that still need to be fixed post-migration. You can also use the --fix option to automatically fix certain issues. Issues that can't be fixed automatically are listed along with suggestions for how to fix them manually.

listitem.para: All cluster nodes have the same cluster stack versions, i.e. not a mixed version env

topic.para: You can perform this procedure on any node in the cluster.

step.para: Log in to the node either as the &rootuser; user or as a user with sudo privileges.
Run the cluster health check with the --fix option to automatically fix certain issues:
TODO Need to test and expand
